action.reasoning: Observation: local checkpoint comparison shows checkpoints/last.pt is by far the strongest remaining model on validation (0.0426 vs 0.0061 for best.pt/baseline.pt), confirming the currently saved best.pt is corrupted/overwritten. Analysis: with only ~1.5h left and recent training runs taking ~50+ minutes with poor hidden-test correlation, the highest expected-value action is to immediately submit the strongest remaining checkpoint rather than risk more training. To avoid another mistaken submission, first copy last.pt over best.pt so the canonical path points to the strongest model, then submit eval on checkpoints/best.pt. Decision: promote last.pt to best.pt and submit evaluation now.
